trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3 (MH3, released 2024-06-14) is a direct-to-Modern set with no single plane identity; its red-green Limited archetype leans into Landfall, reviving the mechanic associated with the Zendikar block (2009-2011) and Zendikar Rising (2020). [Scryfall API; draftsim.com: Modern Horizons 3 Limited Guide via WebSearch]

A {1}{R} 2/2 Human Scout with Haste, Reckless Pyrosurfer gains Battle Cry on each landfall trigger — meaning in a single turn with multiple land drops (via fetchlands or ramp), every land entry converts this into a temporary lord giving all other attackers +1/+0. Battle Cry was originally a New Phyrexia keyword (2011); its return here in MH3 signals the set's retro-mechanic reach. EDHREC rank 16,615. [Scryfall]

The card has no flavor text (Scryfall flavor_text field is null). Illustrated by L.A. Draws, an artist associated with several MH3 cards. The card's type line is Human Scout — the Scout subtype is lightly supported in MTG outside of Zendikar and Ixalan. [Scryfall]

Reckless Pyrosurfer is a notable synergy bridge between two distinct archetypes: Landfall (which requires land drops) and Battle Cry (which requires attacking). It rewards aggressive Landfall shells that fetch or ramp aggressively — a niche but coherent design space. Modern's fetch-land density (Scalding Tarn, Arid Mesa) makes multi-trigger turns realistic. [Scryfall; dotesports.com: Best MH3 Draft and Sealed removal via WebSearch]
